strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, desktop and embedded — far exceeds the 6+ year requirement
Direct experience with the core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, Git, and AI-agent/MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching workshops on testing and Selenium
concerns: Resume does not explicitly mention Nest.js or Vitest, though adjacent Node.js/Jest-style testing experience suggests fast ramp-up
No explicit PostgreSQL or major cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) callouts beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz and Kubernetes for GISCollective
Currently in a career gap since October 2025, though recent re:cinq role kept skills current

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Software craftsmanship and testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD, workshops)

response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong match for this Senior Fullstack role: he brings 15+ years of polyglot full-stack delivery, current hands-on experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes, and — critically — recent work at re:cinq building MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks, directly aligning with the required AI agent development skill. His craftsmanship pedigree (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, teaching testing workshops) maps cleanly onto the role's emphasis on clean code, code reviews, and process improvement, and his founder/staff-level history shows he can own end-to-end features and contribute to architecture decisions from day one.
